name: @justestif/pk
description: Project knowledge — structured intake, search, and recall

scripts.build:
bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target bun && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bun
' | cat - dist/index.js > dist/tmp.js && mv dist/tmp.js dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun test
